subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-06-08 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: You must act on the divine counsels, inasmuch as they are the remedy for every ailment. Make use of this cure. Be mindful of God. Have discussions on spiritual subjects
subcodes.first_line_orig: باید بوصایای الهیه عامل شوید زیرا این وصایا علاج هر دردی است این علاج را بکار برید
subcodes.subjects: @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @oneness; unity of religion, @love and unity, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @call to action, @spiritual transformation
